mapper.select: select e.about_id,e.username,e.name,e.phone,e.from,e.last_login_at,e.last_login_ip,e.code,e.split_account_config_id, c.rule_name,c.rule_value,c.status,c.description from employees e left join split_account_config c on e.split_account_config_id = c.id and c.deleted_at = 0 where e.about_id = #{aboutId} and e.phone = #{phone} and username = #{phone}
